title: rosa × dumetorum var. ciliata
intro: Rosa × dumetorum var. ciliata, also known as wild rose or Rosa dumetorum, is a perennial shrub that belongs to the family Rosaceae. It is a variety of rose species known for its medicinal properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The plant contains antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds that have been traditionally used to treat digestive problems, skin conditions, and menstrual issues. Rosa × dumetorum var. ciliata can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which have been used to promote relaxation, reduce inflammation, and support overall well-being.
